evals.prompt: I have a classic Mapbox Streets style and want my Deck.gl ScatterplotLayer to render below road and POI labels. What should I set?
expectations: Recommends finding a symbol/text label layer id from map.getStyle().layers
Sets the deck.gl layer beforeId to that label layer id
Explains that beforeId has no effect in non-interleaved mode

evals.prompt: The app uses Mapbox v3 Standard Style. I tried beforeId but my Deck.gl layer placement is unreliable. What should I use?
expectations: Recommends using deck.gl layer slot with Mapbox v3 Standard Style
Mentions slot values such as bottom, middle, or top
Explains that Standard Style slots are preferred over brittle layer ids

evals.prompt: I have Deck.gl halo, point, and text layers for selected map items. What order should they be in?
expectations: Places points above halos and makes points pickable
Places labels above points when labels are app-owned foreground context
Mentions selected or active content can render above less-important base labels when needed
